{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320483681D51A04E24FEF43A92B"}"},"total":903},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7398448543188468542","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，喜欢看第四天才的家人们有福了，这本书真的特别好看。全文沙雕搞笑真的很好，玩家们都很沙雕无厘头，充分体现了沙雕的玩家，而且主角也是一路爽过去的，既爽又不是太无敌，并且特别沙雕搞笑，而且还有热血。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722587835,"group_id":"7320125789070953534","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个非常爱看小说的人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N40cMxa15+qJyZDZltrlWH+KNB1Hu3qbGfESkG3yEtZn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fcb70742b9174cb4aadcbad1dabb45a1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796010&x-signature=PIZFkzdXZSJ0KTcxFVpMybQinvs%3D","user_id":"3105491084120324","user_name":"坐忘道里的虚史学家"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3105491084120324","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7320125789070953534","book_info":{"abstract":"“禽兽啊！刚才草丛冲出几个变态，二话不说就把我扒光了！”

  “宗主不好啦，那帮人渣害把咱们宗门搬空了，半块砖头都没剩下！”

  “本仙尊最后悔的事，就是对那群变态亮了血条！”

  “魔族全军听本王号令……我靠，全是卧底，玩个毛！”

  “本神……我靠，那群祸害来了，快跑啊！”
